prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Beneath the rippling blue of the ocean, in a cozy nook of waving kelp, lived Ollie the octopus. Ollie had eight soft arms and a very shy smile; he liked to hide behind a shell and watch the seahorses dance and the clownfish play tag. Each time he saw them laughing, his little heart wished for a friend to join him, too. So every morning Ollie practiced a brave wave and a tiny bubble-hello, hoping that one day he would find the courage to say hello for real.
